spells.description: Rav'i hurls 3 waves of stomach acid in lines toward an enemy, inflicting $s1 Nature damage to enemies caught in the waves and decreasing their movement speed by $s2% and their damage done by $s3%.
spells.name: Regurgitate

spells.description: Rav'i shoots globs of venom at 3 enemies that each inflict $s1 Nature damage and an additional $1307573s1 Nature damage to enemies within $1307573a yd every $t2 sec for $d.
spells.name: Triple Shot

spells.coaching_note: Quake hits everyone; the falling stalactites hit hardest (~2.7x) — move out of their impact zones. Skewers Flying Twinfangs / drops Fresh Meat.
spells.description:
Rav'i stomps impatiently, sending a quake through the temple that inflicts $1307894s1 Nature damage to all enemies and breaks several stalactites from the ceiling. Each stalactite inflicts $s1 Nature damage to all enemies within $a1 yards of the impact.

Flying Twinfangs are skewered by the falling rocks, dropping $@spellname1307703 into Rav'i's pit.
spells.name: Ravenous Stomp

spells.description: The Writhing Coil slices their current target with a bladed tail, inflicting $s1 Physical damage.
spells.name: Tail Scythe

spells.description: Every snake within the Writhing Coil unleashes a relentless rattle, inflicting $1299080s1 Physical damage every $t1 sec. This effect stacks, and increases its applications every $t1 sec.
spells.name: Death Rattle

spells.description: The Writhing Coil burrows across the ground, inflicting $s1 Nature damage to enemies in its path.
spells.name: Burrowing Charge

spells.description: The Writhing Coil shoots venom at all enemies, inflicting $s1 Nature damage and an additional $s2 Nature damage every $t2 sec for $d.
spells.name: Synchronized Venom

spells.description: The Writhing Coil directs a sequence of vicious attacks at an enemy.
spells.name: Vindictive Onslaught

spells.description: The Writhing Coil unleashes a spray of venom at an enemy, inflicting $s2 Nature damage to enemies in a cone in front of them.
spells.name: Venom Jet

spells.coaching_note: Intercept the beams to deny Zul'jan his buff (you take Nature DoT on interception).
spells.description:
Zul'jan briefly wields the Fang of Ula'tek as snake heads focus ancient beams into him for $d, granting $@spellname1300888.

Upon interception by players, the beams instead inflict $1300886s1 Nature damage every $t1 sec and apply $@spellname1300894.
spells.name: Ritual of the Fang

spells.description: Zul'jan unleashes spinning axes that ricochet through the arena and eviscerate players on contact, inflicting $1301114s1 Physical damage every 0.$s2 sec.
spells.name: Axegrinder

spells.description: Zul'jan hacks twice at his current target, inflicting $1301353s1 Physical damage with each strike.
spells.name: Chop Down

spells.description: Zul'jan hurls an axe at a player, inflicting $1301508s1 Physical damage to all players caught in its path and an additional $1301508s2 Physical damage every $1301508t2 sec for $1301508d.
spells.name: Boneslicer

spells.coaching_note: Enrage — soothe to remove (its melee ramps attack speed).
spells.name: Ravenous

spells.description:
The Twinfang spits numbing venom at players, inflicting $1307269s1 Nature damage on impact and an additional $1294569s2 Nature damage every $1294569t2 sec for $1294569d.

Affected players become paralyzed over time, reducing their movement speed by $1294569s1% with each tick.
spells.name: Paralyzing Shots

spells.description: The Twinfang unleashes noxious gas from its jaws, inflicting $1306669s1 Nature damage every $1306669t1 sec to players caught within its breath.
spells.name: Toxic Breath

spells.description: Inflicts $1289416s1 Nature damage and an additional $1307571s1 Nature damage every $1307571t1 sec for $1307571d.
spells.name: Envenom

spells.description: Inflicts $1289416s1 Nature damage and an additional $1307571s1 Nature damage every $1307571t1 sec for $1307571d.
spells.name: Mass Envenom

spells.description: Inflicts $s1 Physical damage and reduces haste by $s2% for $d. This effect ignores armor.
spells.name: Piercing Hiss

spells.description: Inflicts $1306381s1 Nature damage.
spells.name: Fetid Spit

spells.description: Caster launches a rapid stream of venom, inflicting $s1 Nature damage every $t1 sec to enemies in a cone in front of them for $1294934d.
spells.name: Noxious Spray

spells.description: The serpent spins violently, inflicting $s1 Nature damage.
spells.name: Virulent Whirl

spells.description: The serpent infests players with eggs, inflicting Nature damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, the infestations burst into Hatchlings.
spells.name: Infest

spells.description: The writhe injects the target with powerful venom, increasing damage taken by $s1% for $d.
spells.name: Corrosive Fangs

spells.description: The writhe rattles its tail, inflicting $1284859s1 Physical damage every $t1 sec for $d. This effect ignores armor.
spells.name: Rattle

spells.coaching_note: Applies a heal-absorb — burst through it before the next heal lands.
spells.description: The Ritual Chieftain invokes spirits of the altar to gut players, inflicting $1306641s1 Physical damage and causing the next $1306550s1 healing to be absorbed.
spells.name: Blood Sacrifice

spells.description: The chieftain hacks his current target, inflicting $s1 Physical damage.
spells.name: Dismember
